title: Drone attack
description: Ukrainian drones actually cut the Russian land corridor to Crimea, - Politico Edition writes that thanks to the mass use of medium-range drones, Ukraine began to systematically attack the P-280 "Novorossiya" route, which connects Russia with occupied Crimea through Mariupol and Melitopol. It is through it that the Russian troops in the south of Ukraine are supplied. According to the Ukrainian military, since the beginning of spring...

title: Drone strike
description: They spoke with Nikushor Dan - Mr. President of Romania. On behalf of all Ukrainians, he expressed support for Romania and wished for a speedy recovery to the victims of the night strike of a Russian drone on a residential building in Galatsia. It is important that there is a principled, prompt and strong reaction of Romania to what happened. Ukraine is ready to support the security of Romania, which has been consistently helping us defend itself against...

description_uk: Говорили з Нікушором Даном – паном Президентом Румунії. Від усіх українців висловив підтримку Румунії та побажав якнайшвидшого одужання постраждалим від нічного удару російського дрона по житловому будинку в Галаці. Важливо, що є принципова, оперативна і сильна реакція Румунії на те, що сталося. Україна готова підтримати безпеку Румунії, яка вже пʼятий рік послідовно допомагає нам захищатися від...

description: 🤡 Pinya stated that he heard about a drone in Romania, but he does not know what kind of drone it was. He says that no one can tell about the origin of the drone without an examination. Let us remind you that at night a Russian UAV fell on a residential building in Romania. The Consulate General of the Russian Federation in the country was closed.
description_en: 🤡 Pinya stated that he heard about a drone in Romania, but he does not know what kind of drone it was. He says that no one can tell about the origin of the drone without an examination. Let us remind you that at night a Russian UAV fell on a residential building in Romania. The Consulate General of the Russian Federation in the country was closed.
description_uk: 🤡 пыня заявил, что слышал о беспилотнике в Румынии, но не знает, что это был за дрон Говорит, что никто не может сказать о происхождении беспилотника без экспертизы. Напомним, что ночью руснявный БПЛА упал на жилой дом в Румынии. Генконсульство рф в стране закрыли.
